productDisplayName: Paris Hilton Fairy Dust Women Perfume
description: The Fairy Dust perfume for women from paris hilton, the face of contemporary whimsy, is a floral, feminine perfume. The notes include sparkling prosecco accord, pink peony, orange blossom, spring gardenia, water lily, peach nectar, sueded patchouli, cashmere musk and vanilla cream. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
